subject: [SLICEMS] Add bw decrease logics and enhance runtime config feature
commit_message:
[SLICEMS] Add bw decrease logics and enhance runtime config feature

Add closed loop assurance decrease bw logics. Add a thread transfers
latest data from cbs client configs to corresponding value.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3195
Signed-off-by: qingshuting <qingshuting1@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I2b00d697298f6f284f91e1475c0d628a8df4f9ff

Patch Set 1:

Hi all. After rebase, there appear some copyright errors. Anyone know why it happen? Like some errors are wrong, like some file are created by me, but jenkins says it requires other company's copyright.  Thanks.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hi all. After rebase, there appear some copyright errors. Anyone know why it happen? Like some errors are wrong, like some file are created by me, but jenkins says it requires other company's copyright.  Thanks.

For all of the files modified by YOU for this push, there needs to be a copyright notice for 2022. For example, if you are doing this push as Huawei Canada, then you need to have a copyright 2022 notice for Huawei Canada. Instead, there is a mishmash of copyright notices, with various spellings. Please make your spellings consistent.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(8 comments)

By the way, you did not have to abandon the previous push and create a new one. The "[Rebase]" button would have done most of the work for you, unless there were conflicts.

These are mostly comments I had added to your previous push.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (8 comments)
> 
> By the way, you did not have to abandon the previous push and create a new one. The "[Rebase]" button would have done most of the work for you, unless there were conflicts.
> 
> These are mostly comments I had added to your previous push.

Decheng and me have conflicts. I rebased his commit. Once he updates a new patch, mine was not able to get updated to his latest commit. I have to revert my local commit, so as to redo a rebase. In this case, i'll have a new push since previous commit msg was lost. So i have to abadon the previous one.
